title: paepalanthus brachyphyllus
intro: Paepalanthus brachyphyllus, also known as the 'short-leaved Paepalanthus', is a type of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine in Brazil, where it is believed to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paepalanthus brachyphyllus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
